prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Closeout photos for Pipe bedding & backfill show the installed work following the referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations shown for this element are in place, and the inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material on hand: project specs, IPC 306.
title: Compliance check: Pipe bedding & backfill (industrial site)
